summary: Comprehensive testing of Podium-style public review page features. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend review page displays correctly on desktop and mobile with all UI elements. Click tracking integration working.

deprecation_warnings: Route files missing default exports (helper files) - non-blocking

review_page_api.details: GET /api/review/page/imos-demo returns store data with review_links, brand_kit, store info

click_tracking_api.details: POST /api/review/track-click/imos-demo successfully tracks clicks for all platforms

click_stats_api.details: GET /api/review/click-stats/{store_id} returns store totals and detailed breakdown

forgot_password_security.details: POST /api/auth/forgot-password/request does NOT return dev_code - only returns generic message

review_page_ui.details: All UI elements displayed: logo, store name, 5 review links (Google, Yelp, Facebook, DealerRater, Edmunds custom), phone, website, address, Powered by iMOs footer

mobile_responsiveness.details: Review page fully responsive on mobile (390x844 viewport)

seed_data_creation: Store 'imos-demo' already seeded with review links
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public review page feature complete and tested. All APIs working: review page data, click tracking, click stats. Debug endpoint removed. Forgot password no longer leaks dev_code. Frontend displays all elements correctly on desktop and mobile.
mocked_api: None. All APIs are live against local MongoDB. Resend email API is configured and sending password reset emails.
